notFound.pageDesc: The address you accessed does not exist or has been removed. Check the link or return to the home page.

hero.lead: Manga Reader is a platform dedicated to reading and cataloguing manga, manhwa, and manhua. We bring passionate readers together in one place — free, ad-free, and community-driven.

mission.statementBefore: Bring passionate readers together and build a
mission.body: We believe the best reading experience is a shared one. That's why we invest in tools that connect readers, translators, and fans — from the first chapter to the last theory discussion.

offer.title: What we offer
offer.subtitle: An extensive catalogue, a personal library, forums and reading groups — all in one place, free and ad-free.

catalog.title: Extensive catalogue
catalog.desc: Manga, manhwa, and manhua organised by genre, status, and language — always growing with the community.

library.title: Personal library
library.desc: Track what you're reading, build lists, mark favourites, and never lose your place again.

reviews.title: Reviews and scores
reviews.desc: Rate titles by criteria — art, story, pacing — and discover what other readers thought.

forum.title: Discussion forums
forum.desc: Debate arcs, theories, and releases with marked spoilers and respect for differing opinions.

groups.title: Reading groups
groups.desc: Read together, follow scan groups, and keep up with the translations you love.

free.title: Free and ad-free
free.desc: Everything in one place, for free. No banners, no pop-ups — the focus is reading, not advertising.

community.title: Community at the centre
community.body: Reading is better together. Every review, forum thread, and reading group exists to bring creators, translators, and readers closer — and to give a voice to those who make this scene happen.

readers.label: Readers
readers.desc: They catalogue, review, and debate what they love.

translators.label: Translators
translators.desc: Scan groups that bring titles closer to the public.

fans.label: Fans worldwide
fans.desc: Connected by a shared passion for Asian comics.

cta.title: Ready to start reading?
cta.body: Create your free account, build your library, and join the conversation. No cost, no ads.

publishWork.title: Publish work
publishWork.description1: If you are an author and wish to publish your work on our platform, get in touch with us. We accept manga, webtoons, fanfics, fanarts, and other creative works.
publishWork.description2: Fill in the form below with information about your work and we will get in touch shortly.
